metadata.description: Brandon Guest's personal Claude Code skills

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python project tooling with uv: scaffold a project (uv-setup), day-to-day development (uv-develop), and pre-commit hygiene (pre-commit-setup)

plugins.name: agent-workflow
plugins.description: Agent session helpers: write troubleshooting handoffs (handoff) and track upstream GitHub issues/PRs/releases (watchlist)

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: Refactor frontend code as a senior engineer, preserving behavior (senior-frontend-refactor)

plugins.name: ansible
plugins.description: Scaffold tool-install roles into a personal Ansible provisioning playbook (add-ansible-role)

plugins.name: lemonade
plugins.description: Diagnose lemonade-server (lemond) on the Strix Halo box (debug-lemonade)

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Kernel-style AI commit attribution (Assisted-by) enforced by a PreToolUse hook (git-attribution)
